title: No rt/obs discovery metadata on LCI resources
description: spec/11-lci.md §17.5.1: /.well-known/core must list </config>;rt='config', </status>;rt='status';obs, </keys>;rt='keystore', etc. None of the new COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINEs (coap_config.c, coap_keys.c, coap_status.c) set metadata, so no rt/ct/obs attributes are advertised (gateway has CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_WELL_KNOWN_CORE=y). VERIFY: legacy coap_server.c advertises wrong values (rt='lichen.config', /key, /neighbors) — reconcile the two servers. Fix: attach coap_core_metadata with the spec rt values and obs on /status, /status/neighbors.
